# Federico Galliani — "Portrait KID"
Award-winning Italian black & grey portrait realism tattoo artist. Touring the United States in 2026: Milwaukee (Oct 6-8), Chicago, Madison, Minneapolis. Specialty: hyper-realistic portraits and large-scale black-and-grey. Books portrait pieces at conventions. Also runs the Portrait Realism Academy (portraitrealismacademy.com) teaching the grey-wash method to tattoo artists.
Booking: booking@federicogalliani.com
